full_text:
Zhao Zi (Dedu) 趙姿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Zi (趙姿), styledDedu, was born in Nanyang. A man of wide learning, he was sent to offer thanks for Quan being made king, using it as an occasion to praise Wu. Zhao Zi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
